title: Xtra Flaky British Broad Beans Pie
description: A traditional British dish featuring broad beans in a flaky pastry crust, perfect for a paleo-friendly meal. This pie is made with fatty and energizing ingredients to keep you satisfied.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the broad beans, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and lard.
Add the almond flour to the egg mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough and place it in a pie dish.
Fill the pie crust with the broad bean mixture.
Roll out the remaining dough and use it to cover the pie.
Crimp the edges to seal the pie.
Cut a few slits in the top of the pie to allow steam to escape.
Bake the pie for 40 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
